title: 5X AU Balanced Flue Gas Fireplace | Heat & Glo
description: 5X AU Balanced Flue: gas fireplace engineered for Australia and New Zealand markets. Compliance: AS/NZS 5263. Available through AGA-certified dealers in AU/NZ.

hero.h1: Built for the Australian and New Zealand hearth.
hero.h1_em: the Australian and New Zealand hearth.
hero.lede: The 5X AU Balanced Flue is a gas fireplace engineered to AS/NZS 5263 standards for the Australian and New Zealand markets. Sold and installed through Heat & Glo's AGA-certified regional dealer network.
